en: The word of the LORD that came to Zephaniah the son of Cushi, son of Gedaliah, son of Amariah, son of Hezekiah, in the days of Josiah the son of Amon, king of Judah.
zh: 猶大王亞們的兒子約西亞在位的時候，耶和華的話臨到希西家的玄孫、亞瑪利雅的曾孫、基大利的孫子、古示的兒子西番雅。

en: "I will utterly sweep away everything from the face of the earth," declares the LORD.
zh: 耶和華說： “我必把萬物從地上 完全除滅。”

en: "I will sweep away man and beast; I will sweep away the birds of the heavens and the fish of the sea, and the rubble with the wicked. I will cut off mankind from the face of the earth," declares the LORD.
zh: 耶和華說： “我必除滅人類、牲畜、 空中飛鳥、 海裡的魚。 我必使惡人跌倒， 我必把人類從地上剪除。

en: "I will stretch out my hand against Judah and against all the inhabitants of Jerusalem; and I will cut off from this place the remnant of Baal and the name of the idolatrous priests along with the priests,
zh: 我必伸手攻擊猶大， 攻擊耶路撒冷所有的居民。 我必從這地方除掉巴力所餘下的， 除掉拜偶像的祭司的名字， 以及耶和華的祭司；

en: those who bow down on the roofs to the host of the heavens, those who bow down and swear to the LORD and yet swear by Milcom,
zh: 就是那些在房頂上敬拜天上萬象的， 那些敬拜耶和華， 指著他起誓，又指著瑪勒公起誓的，

en: those who have turned back from following the LORD, who do not seek the LORD or inquire of him."
zh: 那些轉離不跟從耶和華的， 不尋找耶和華， 也不求問他的。”

en: Be silent before the Lord GOD! For the day of the LORD is near; the LORD has prepared a sacrifice and consecrated his guests.
zh: 你要在主耶和華面前肅靜！ 因為耶和華的日子臨近了， 因為耶和華已經預備了祭物， 把自己所請來的人分別為聖。

en: And on the day of the LORD's sacrifice- "I will punish the officials and the king's sons and all who array themselves in foreign attire.
zh: “到了我耶和華獻祭的日子， 我必懲罰首領和王子， 懲罰所有穿外族衣服的人。

en: On that day I will punish everyone who leaps over the threshold, and those who fill their master's house with violence and fraud.
zh: 到那日，我必懲罰所有跳過門檻的， 所有使強暴和欺詐充滿主人房屋的。”

en: "On that day," declares the LORD, "a cry will be heard from the Fish Gate, a wail from the Second Quarter, a loud crash from the hills.
zh: 耶和華說： “到那日， 必有呼叫的聲音從魚門發出來， 必有哀號從新區發出來， 必有崩裂巨響從山間發出來。

en: Wail, O inhabitants of the Mortar! For all the traders are no more; all who weigh out silver are cut off.
zh: 瑪革提施的居民哪！你們要哀號， 因為所有的商人都滅亡了； 所有稱銀子的都被剪除了。

en: At that time I will search Jerusalem with lamps, and I will punish the men who are complacent, those who say in their hearts, 'The LORD will not do good, nor will he do ill.'
zh: 那時， 我必提燈搜查耶路撒冷， 懲罰那些在罪中陶然自得的人 。 這些人心裡說： ‘耶和華必不賜福，也不降禍。’

en: Their goods shall be plundered, and their houses laid waste. Though they build houses, they shall not inhabit them; though they plant vineyards, they shall not drink wine from them."
zh: 他們的財寶必成為掠物， 他們的房屋必變為廢墟。 他們建造房屋，卻不得住在其中； 他們栽植葡萄園，卻不得喝所出的酒。”

en: The great day of the LORD is near, near and hastening fast; the sound of the day of the LORD is bitter; the mighty man cries aloud there.
zh: 耶和華的大日子臨近了， 臨近了，來得非常快速。 聽！耶和華的日子的聲音。 在那日，勇士要哀痛地號叫。

en: A day of wrath is that day, a day of distress and anguish, a day of ruin and devastation, a day of darkness and gloom, a day of clouds and thick darkness,
zh: 那日是忿怒的日子， 是困苦艱難的日子， 是荒廢淒涼的日子， 是黑暗幽冥的日子， 是密雲漆黑的日子，

en: a day of trumpet blast and battle cry against the fortified cities and against the lofty battlements.
zh: 是吹號吶喊， 要攻打堅城， 進擊高聳城樓的日子。

en: I will bring distress on mankind, so that they shall walk like the blind, because they have sinned against the LORD; their blood shall be poured out like dust, and their flesh like dung.
zh: 我要使人受困苦， 以致他們像瞎子行走， 因為他們得罪耶和華。 他們的鮮血必倒出，如倒灰塵一樣， 他們的身體必被遺棄像糞土一般。

en: Neither their silver nor their gold shall be able to deliver them on the day of the wrath of the LORD. In the fire of his jealousy, all the earth shall be consumed; for a full and sudden end he will make of all the inhabitants of the earth.
zh: 在耶和華發怒的日子， 他們的金銀也不能救他們， 全地都要被他的妒火吞滅； 因為他要徹底毀滅地上所有的居民， 真是可怕的毀滅。
